entries.text: Themes disabled for indefinite period. Rework needed
Now supporting Publishable Keys for Supabase along with Anon keys
Removed dead code from main file
Settings panel, unified Database, Console, Appearance, Export and About in one place
8 themes: Nebula, Ember, Abyss, Blood & Iron, Verdant, Parchment, Frost, Void
Theme transition animation. 3 second rebuild effect on theme switch
Export / Import system. download worlds as JSON, import from file
Changelog page. standalone page loaded from changelog.json
Settings persist across reloads via localStorage
Emoji tray closing immediately on open due to event bubbling race condition
Themes not applying, specificity clash between :root and [data-theme] selectors
Entry detail page not scrollable. body height was min-height instead of height
Focus Mode. distraction-free writing overlay for rich text fields with word counter
Global search across all worlds, tabs and entries
Entry status (Draft, Planned, In Progress, Complete) and star/pin system
@ entry linking in rich text fields, type @ to link to any entry
Custom tab icons: choose from emoji tray or custom icons in assets/icons/
Auto-retry on network errors. Supabase fetch failures retry up to 3 times
Rich text fields now save correctly, fixed silent skip bug on save
Console interceptor now safely handles all environments
Status badge alignment with tab badge in entry header
Initial release, single-file worldbuilding wiki
Supabase and Turso database support
Worlds, tabs and entries with custom fields
Rich text editor with formatting toolbar
Relation fields, link entries across tabs
Card and table display modes
Duplicate entry functionality
